COPYS DEL SITIO WEB

Documento 10 — Borrador para revisión y aprobación de Karel Frometa

INSTRUCCIONES: Este documento contiene los textos listos para el sitio web de Thor Metal Art. Karel debe revisar cada sección, aprobar o anotar cambios, y devolver al consultor. Los textos en [corchetes] requieren datos del cliente para completarse.

RESUMEN SEO — TITLE TAGS Y META DESCRIPTIONS

Los siguientes textos son los que aparecen en Google cuando alguien busca y encuentra el sitio. Son críticos para el SEO local. Copiar exactamente como están en la plataforma web.

Página

Title Tag | Meta Description

Home

Thor Metal Art Miami | Custom Metal Fabrication & Artistic Metalwork

→ META: Custom metal gates, railings, fences, furniture & sculpture in Miami. Exclusive design, free estimates. Licensed & insured. Serving Miami-Dade & Broward. (155 chars)

Custom Metal Gates

Custom Metal Gates Miami | Thor Metal Art

→ META: Handcrafted custom metal gates for residential & commercial properties in Miami. Free estimates. Water jet precision + artistic finish. (142 chars)

Metal Railings

Metal Railings Miami | Custom Design | Thor Metal Art

→ META: Custom metal railings for stairs, balconies & porches in Miami. Every railing is designed and fabricated to order. Free estimate. (134 chars)

Metal Fences

Custom Metal Fences Miami | Thor Metal Art

→ META: Decorative and security metal fences custom-designed for Miami homes and businesses. Durable, beautiful, and built to last. Free estimate. (147 chars)

Custom Metal Furniture

Custom Metal Furniture Miami | Thor Metal Art

→ META: Unique custom metal furniture designed and fabricated in Miami. Tables, shelves, beds, and more — each piece is one of a kind. (132 chars)

Metal Sculpture & Art

Metal Sculpture & Art Miami | Thor Metal Art

→ META: Original metal sculptures and commissioned art pieces by Miami-based metalwork artist. Residential, commercial & public installations. (142 chars)

Process / Cómo Trabajamos

How We Work | Custom Metal Fabrication Process | Thor Metal Art

→ META: From concept to installation — our custom metalwork process in Miami. Design, water jet cutting, fabrication, finishing, and delivery. (145 chars)

Contact / Contacto

Contact Thor Metal Art Miami | Free Estimate

→ META: Get a free estimate from Thor Metal Art. Custom metal fabrication & art in Miami. Call, WhatsApp, or fill out our quick form. (131 chars)

PÁGINA 1

HOME — Página Principal

El hub de todo el sitio. Dos CTAs duales (Producción + Arte). Primer impacto = conversión.

OBJETIVO de la Home: el visitante debe entender en 5 segundos qué hace Thor Metal Art, dónde está, y qué hacer a continuación. Sin scrollear.

SECCIÓN: HERO (primera pantalla visible)

H1 — Headline principal (EN)

H1 — Texto grande, visible sobre imagen de obra destacada

Custom Metal Fabrication & Art in Miami

Precision Craftsmanship. Exclusive Design. Free Estimates.

H1 — Headline principal (ES — versión alternativa si se usa bilingüe)

H1 ES

Metalwork Personalizado en Miami

Diseño exclusivo · Fabricación de precisión · Cotización gratis

Dos CTAs principales

CTAs — Aparecen debajo del H1

► GET A FREE QUOTE (botón 1 — naranja/dorado — lleva a formulario de contacto)

► VIEW OUR ART (botón 2 — borde blanco — lleva a sección Arte/Comisiones)

Trust bar (barra de confianza debajo del hero)

TRUST BAR — fila horizontal de íconos + texto corto. [X.X] = actualizar con el rating real de Google cuando haya reseñas

🔩 Miami-Based | ✓ Licensed & Insured | ⭐ [X.X] Stars on Google | ✔ Free Estimates | 💧 Water Jet Precision

SECCIÓN: SERVICIOS (grid de tarjetas)

Título de sección

SECTION TITLE

What We Build

From structural gates to sculptural art — everything custom, everything in Miami.

Tarjetas de servicios (6 tarjetas)

CARDS — Una tarjeta por servicio. Cada una tiene foto, título, descripción corta, botón "Learn More"

1. CUSTOM GATES

Design, fabricate & install. Residential and commercial. Iron, steel, stainless.

2. METAL RAILINGS

Stairs, balconies, pool decks. Safety meets style — every railing built to spec.

3. METAL FENCES

Perimeter fencing with personality. Privacy, security, and custom design.

4. METAL FURNITURE

Tables, shelves, beds, chairs. One-of-a-kind pieces built to order.

5. METAL STAIRS

Floating stairs, spiral stairs, handrails. Structural precision + visual impact.

6. SCULPTURE & ART

Original metal sculpture and commissioned art pieces. Miami-based artist.

SECCIÓN: SOBRE NOSOTROS (breve, en Home)

ABOUT SNIPPET — Bloque corto en Home. El texto completo va en una página About separada si se crea.

About Thor Metal Art

We're a Miami-based custom metal fabrication studio. Every piece we make — from a residential gate to a sculptural installation — is designed and fabricated in-house, with the same level of care.

Founded by Karel Frometa, a metalwork craftsman with [X] years of experience, Thor Metal Art combines water jet cutting technology with old-school welding craft to deliver work that lasts decades.

Serving Miami-Dade & Broward County.

CTA de esta sección

ABOUT CTA

► See Our Process (botón — lleva a página "Cómo Trabajamos")

PÁGINA 2

SERVICIOS DE FABRICACIÓN — Páginas individuales por servicio

Una página por servicio con SEO local. Misma estructura para las 5 páginas de producción.

ESTRUCTURA REPETIDA: Cada página de servicio sigue exactamente esta estructura. Solo cambia el servicio, las medidas, las fotos y los detalles técnicos.

PÁGINA: CUSTOM METAL GATES MIAMI

H1

H1

Custom Metal Gates Miami

Hand-Crafted. Built to Last. Designed for You.

Introducción (150–200 palabras)

INTRO COPY

Your gate is the first thing people see. At Thor Metal Art, we design and fabricate custom metal gates that combine security with style — built specifically for your property, your design, and your vision.

Every gate we make starts with a conversation. We'll discuss your dimensions, the design direction (modern, ornamental, minimalist, or custom artwork), the material (steel, iron, stainless), and the finish. Then we'll bring it to life in our Miami workshop.

We handle everything in-house: design, water jet cutting, welding, finishing, and installation. No middlemen. One team, from concept to installation.

Serving Miami-Dade and Broward County.

Sección: Lo que hacemos (bullet points)

INCLUDES LIST

What's Included:

• Custom design — we work from your sketch, inspiration images, or create a new design

• Water jet precision cutting — clean, exact shapes, from simple to intricate

• MIG/TIG welding — structural welds that last decades

• Custom finish — powder coat, paint, patina, or raw steel

• Professional installation — we handle permits and installation

• Free estimate — before any commitment

FAQ mínima (2–3 preguntas)

FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions:

How long does a custom gate take?

Typically 3–5 weeks from approved design to installation, depending on complexity and our current production schedule.

Do you handle permits?

Yes. For gates that require permits in Miami-Dade or Broward County, we can manage the process or guide you through it.

What's the price range for a custom gate?

Custom gates vary widely based on size, material, and design complexity. Contact us for a free, no-commitment estimate.

CTA final

PAGE CTA

Ready to design your gate?

► GET A FREE ESTIMATE — Call [número], WhatsApp, or fill out our quick form below.

Página

H1 sugerido + diferenciador clave

Metal Railings Miami

Metal Railings Miami | Custom Design

→ Diferenciador: "Every railing is designed to the exact measurements of your stairs, balcony, or pool deck. Safety code compliant and beautiful."

Custom Metal Fences Miami

Custom Metal Fences Miami | Decorative & Security

→ Diferenciador: "Perimeter fencing that doesn't sacrifice design for security. Custom height, pattern, and finish for every property."

Custom Metal Furniture Miami

Custom Metal Furniture Miami | One-of-a-Kind Pieces

→ Diferenciador: "Metal furniture that outlasts trends. Tables, shelves, beds, and chairs — built to your exact specifications."

Metal Stairs Miami

Metal Stairs & Handrails Miami | Modern Design

→ Diferenciador: "Floating stairs, spiral staircases, industrial handrails. Structural engineering meets artistic metalwork."

PÁGINA 3

ARTE & COMISIONES — Motor Artista

Tono diferente: más reflexivo, personal. El artista habla. No es venta — es invitación.

H1 — Headline de la sección Arte

H1 ARTE

Metal as Art

Original Sculptures & Commissioned Pieces by Karel Frometa — Miami

Artist Statement (120–150 palabras)

ARTIST STATEMENT — Karel debe personalizar el concepto artístico

I've been working with metal for [X] years — first as a fabricator, then as an artist. The line between the two has always felt artificial to me.

Every weld, every cut, every decision about surface and weight is both a technical and an aesthetic choice. Metal remembers force. It carries the history of how it was shaped.

My sculptures explore [tema o concepto del artista — Karel debe completar esta parte]. The work ranges from small decorative pieces to large-scale installations. Some pieces are part of ongoing series; others are unique commissions created in direct conversation with the client.

If you're interested in a commission, I'd like to hear about your project.

— Karel Frometa, Miami

[NOTA PARA KAREL: Este párrafo sobre tu proceso y concepto artístico es tuyo para escribir. Lo que está arriba es un marco — el contenido personal y artístico viene de ti.]

Cómo funciona una comisión

COMMISSION PROCESS

How to Commission a Piece

1. CONVERSATION

We start with a conversation. Tell me what you're thinking — size, material, concept, space, budget. Nothing is off the table at this stage.

2. CONCEPT & PROPOSAL

I'll develop a concept sketch or description and send you a proposal with timeline and investment.

3. FABRICATION

Once approved, I begin fabrication in my Miami studio. You'll receive progress updates throughout the process.

4. DELIVERY OR INSTALLATION

Depending on the size, the piece is delivered or installed. I'm present for every installation.

► COMMISSION A PIECE — Contact Karel directly: [email] or WhatsApp [número]

Footer de la página Arte

FOOTER COPY ARTE

Each commission is a collaboration. I work with homeowners, interior designers, architects, and hospitality projects.

All commissions are unique — once a piece is made, it won't be replicated.

Based in Miami. Shipping and installation available across South Florida.

PÁGINA 4

CÓMO TRABAJAMOS — Proceso de fabricación

Genera confianza. El cliente que entiende el proceso tiene menos objeciones y cierra más rápido.

H1

H1

How We Work

From First Call to Finished Installation — Everything In-House

Intro de sección

INTRO

We don't outsource. Every project — from design to final weld to installation — is handled by our team in Miami. This means faster communication, consistent quality, and complete accountability for the finished result.

Los 5 pasos del proceso

PROCESS STEPS

STEP 1 — FREE ESTIMATE

Tell us about your project. We'll ask a few questions about dimensions, design, material, and timeline. No commitment, no pressure. We'll respond within 24 hours.

STEP 2 — DESIGN & QUOTE

We'll develop a design proposal (sketch or reference images) and a detailed quote. If you want changes, we iterate until it's right.

STEP 3 — PRODUCTION

Once you approve the design and deposit, we begin fabrication. Depending on complexity, production takes 2–5 weeks. We use water jet cutting, MIG/TIG welding, and custom finishing.

STEP 4 — QUALITY CHECK

Before leaving the studio, every piece is inspected for structural integrity, weld quality, and finish. We don't ship or install anything we wouldn't put in our own home.

STEP 5 — INSTALLATION

Our team handles the installation. We'll coordinate access, manage any permits required, and clean up when we're done. Final payment is due upon your satisfaction.

► READY TO START? Get your free estimate →

PÁGINA 5

CONTACTO — Formulario y datos de contacto

La página de conversión. Hacer que contactar sea lo más fácil posible.

Let's Talk About Your Project

Free estimate. No commitment. We respond within 24 hours.
